The '''High Castle''' on [[Jomark/Legends|Jomark]] had been built by the original inhabitants of Jomark, who had long-since vanished by the time of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. It was a short, dirty building with sometimes ill-fitting stonework, built on what was left of a volcanic cone overlooking [[Ring Lake]] 400 meters below in the center of the cone's crater.

==History==
The High Castle was the building [[Joruus C'baoth]] used as his residence while he awaited the arrival of [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] during the [[Thrawn campaign]].
